scene: A seated portrait in a bright office, framed from the chest up. The person smiles at the camera, raises a peace sign, wears a black collared top, and has a playful red claw headband overlay. Desks, monitors, office chairs, windows, and a bag are visible in the background.

headline: JENSEN HUANG — NVIDIA CEO
